productDisplayName: Reid & Taylor Men Solid Black Muffler
description: Enjoy the winter in style this season with this black knit muffler from Reid and Taylor. Drape it over your kurtas or knot it over your t-shirts and enjoy that hot street food in the mist with much comfort. Length: 170 cm Width: 32 cm Made of marino wool with herringbone pattern knit to offer snug warmth Has tassels at the ends for style Wash care Dry clean recommended Hand wash cold using a mild detergent Do not bleach, wring or tumble dry Dry flat in shade Cool iron
